title: Crypto isn't the problem with the US economy, says senator
summary: Crypto isn't the problem with the US economy, says senator
briefing: Louisiana Senator John Kennedy largely dismissed what he called the “promotion” of cryptocurrency by the Digital Chamber CEO Cody Carbone in a Senate hearing on affordability.

title: Multi-year Bitcoin holder selling falls to 19-month low as halving model flags new market bottom date
summary: Multi-year Bitcoin holder selling falls to 19-month low as halving model flags new market bottom date
briefing: OG Bitcoin holders' spending dropped to a 19-month low, as market cycle indicators point to September as a potential market bottom.

title: Zcash miner Fortitude gets Nasdaq listing via HeartSciences merger
summary: Zcash miner Fortitude gets Nasdaq listing via HeartSciences merger
briefing: The all-stock deal gives Fortitude a Nasdaq listing while HeartSciences retains its healthcare business and existing shareholders keep a minority stake.

title: CFTC chair says perp trading not suitable for all assets it regulates
summary: CFTC chair says perp trading not suitable for all assets it regulates
briefing: Michael Selig told US cotton producers that the agency’s regulatory approach to crypto perpetual futures may not be a “natural fit for traditional commodity markets, like agriculture.”

title: CBOE weighs converting BTC, ETH continuous futures into perpetual futures: Report
summary: CBOE weighs converting BTC, ETH continuous futures into perpetual futures: Report
briefing: As US regulatory changes accelerate the adoption of crypto perpetual futures and rivals Coinbase and Kalshi expand their offerings, Cboe mulls a product overhaul.

title: Chainlink joins European and Korean bank consortia to develop FX settlement network
summary: Chainlink joins European and Korean bank consortia to develop FX settlement network
briefing: Banks across Europe and South Korea will study whether regulated euro and won stablecoins can enable real-time cross-border foreign exchange settlement.

summary: Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown as analysis sees Micron earnings volatility next

summary: Bitcoin slump worsens amid SpaceX rout: Can BTC price hold $60K any longer?
briefing: SpaceX’s $600 billion wipeout rattles tech markets, putting Bitcoin’s $60,000 support at risk as traders brace for a deeper BTC selloff.

summary: AI Agent Triggers Nuclear Strike After Getting Outmaneuvered in Civilization VI

summary: Thailand Expands Crypto Mining Probe Into $300M Chinese Laundering Network

title: US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban
